command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.199 "cat > /tmp/fix_model.py << 'PYEOF'
import json
path = '/home/jose/.openclaw/openclaw.json'
with open(path) as f:
    c = json.load(f)
c['agents']['defaults']['model']['primary'] = 'ollama/qwen3:32b'
with open(path, 'w') as f:
    json.dump(c, f, indent=2)
print('primary model set to ollama/qwen3:32b')
PYEOF
python3 /tmp/fix_model.py"
